footer.tagline: Find & compare the best 3PL providers for your brand.

home.heroDesc: Ensure your business stability by comparing real 3PL performance, operational consistency, and fulfillment fit.
home.sectionHeading: Find the perfect logistics partner for your business, with maximum efficiency
home.sectionDesc: Flowrid selects and provides the most comprehensive, multi-dimensional information to meet your needs, identifying the best-fit 3PL partner from our global network.
home.workspaceHeading: Bridge the operational management between brands and 3PL

search.desc: Compare top fulfillment centers by state, product category, and platform. Get matched in seconds.

directory.checkBox: check the box on any card to compare
directory.noResultsMsg: Try adjusting your search filters or submit an RFQ to get matched.
directory.noResultsStateMsg: We couldn't find any 3PLs in this state yet. Submit an RFQ and we'll match you.
directory.noResultsCombo: We couldn't find exact matches for this combination yet. But we can still help — submit an RFQ and we'll find the right 3PL for your needs.
directory.descState: Compare top-rated third-party logistics providers in {state}. Filter by category, platform, speed, and cost.
directory.descCategory: Compare {category} fulfillment centers in {state}. Find the best match for your brand.
directory.faqFastest: What is the fastest {category} fulfillment in {state}?
directory.faqAvgCost: What is the average cost of 3PL in {state}?
directory.faqSpeed: How fast can orders be fulfilled in {state}?
directory.whatToLook: What to Look for in a {category} 3PL
directory.submitRFQ: Submit an RFQ and we'll find the right match for you.

detail.nichesDesc: Product categories and industries {name} specializes in.
detail.platformsDesc: eCommerce platforms and marketplaces {name} integrates with.
detail.vasDesc: Additional services {name} provides beyond core fulfillment.
detail.locationsDesc: {name} has fulfillment centers strategically located to optimize shipping times and costs.
detail.alternativesDesc: Looking for similar 3PL providers? Here are the top alternatives based on services, specializations, and fulfillment capabilities.
detail.beFirst: Be the first to share your experience working with {name}.
detail.bottomCTADesc: Join thousands of businesses who've found their ideal logistics partners through Flowrid. Let us simplify your search.
detail.awardsDesc: Industry awards and certifications earned by {name}.
detail.topRated3PLDesc: {name} ranks in the top tier of verified fulfillment providers on Flowrid, recognized for consistent operational performance and strong brand satisfaction.
detail.ecomSpecialistDesc: Certified in multi-channel eCommerce fulfillment with demonstrated expertise across major platforms and marketplaces.
detail.qualityAssuredDesc: Verified fulfillment processes and quality control standards that meet Flowrid's quality assurance criteria.
detail.customersDesc: Brands that trust {name} with their fulfillment.

compare.title: Compare 3PL Providers
compare.empty: Go to the 3PL Directory and check the boxes on the cards to select providers for comparison.
compare.emptyFew: Select at least 2 providers to compare.
compare.subtitle: Side-by-side evaluation of your selected fulfillment centers.
compare.ourPickDesc: Based on overall score, {name} is the best match among your selected providers. They excel across key metrics including speed, cost efficiency, and platform compatibility.

rfq.submittedMsg: We'll match you with the best 3PLs and get back to you within 24 hours.
rfq.title: Get Matched with the Best 3PL
rfq.desc: Tell us about your needs and we'll find the perfect fulfillment partner.
rfq.step2Platform: Which platform do you sell on?
rfq.name: Your Name
rfq.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the magic link!

status.noSession: No session found. Please sign in again.
status.timeout: Login timed out. Please try again.
status.unavailable: Authentication service unavailable. Please try again.

auth.joinDesc: This helps us set up the right experience for your business.
auth.brandDesc: I sell products online and need a fulfillment partner to store, pick, pack, and ship orders.
auth.threePLDesc: I operate a warehouse and want to get matched with e-commerce brands looking for fulfillment.
auth.brandJoinDesc: Set up your profile to get matched with top 3PLs.
auth.threePLJoinDesc: Create your partner account to get matched with top brands.
auth.legalConsent: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.accountCreated: Account created! Please check your email to confirm your account, then log in.

saas.noAccount: Don't have an account? Create one
saas.alreadyHave: Already have an account? Sign in

account.desc: Manage orders, inventory, billing, integrations, and provider decisions.

menuItems.overview: Review your brand operations workspace and next actions.
menuItems.orders: Track ecommerce orders and fulfillment status.
menuItems.products: Manage SKUs, product attributes, and catalog signals.
menuItems.inventory: Monitor stock levels and inventory health.
menuItems.inbound: Plan inbound shipments and ASN activity.
menuItems.shipping: Compare rates and manage outbound shipping actions.
menuItems.analytics: Review order, inventory, and warehouse performance trends.
menuItems.billing: Review invoices, usage, and fulfillment costs.
menuItems.integrations: Connect Shopify and ecommerce data sources for better matching.
menuItems.automations: Configure brand-side order, inventory, and notification rules.
menuItems.auditLog: Review account, order, inventory, and integration changes.
menuItems.myRFQs: Track requests for quotation and matched 3PL proposals.
menuItems.settings: Manage your profile, email, password, and preferences.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.desc: Manage your profile, security, and preferences.

saved.title: Saved 3PL
saved.emptyDesc: Your shortlisted fulfillment providers will appear here.
saved.emptyMsg: Browse the directory, check the box on any card, and click Save.
saved.loginPrompt: Log in to see your saved 3PLs.

rfqs.title: My RFQs
rfqs.desc: Track your requests for quotation and matched 3PL proposals.
rfqs.emptyMsg: Submit your first RFQ to get matched with the best 3PLs for your needs.

integrations.title: Store Integrations
integrations.desc: Connect your ecommerce stack so Flowrid can understand your order volume, SKU mix, and shipping zones before matching you with 3PLs.
integrations.shopifyDesc: Import recent orders as matching signals. Flowrid will not expose your token in the browser after saving.

automation.title: Automations
automation.desc: Prepare brand-side automation rules for order notifications, low-stock alerts, and RFQ readiness workflows.
automation.emptyDesc: Once your store is connected, create brand-side rules for notifications and decision workflows without touching warehouse execution automations.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.desc: Review brand account changes such as integrations, RFQs, saved providers, and future synced data events.

dashboard.brandDesc: We connect you with the right 3PL from 2,800+ vetted partners.
dashboard.threePLDesc: We connect you with e-commerce brands looking for fulfillment partners.
dashboard.findMatchDesc: Browse 2,800+ verified 3PLs filtered by category, platform, location, and cost.
dashboard.connectStoreDesc: Connect Shopify so Flowrid can use real order volume, SKU mix, and shipping zones to find the best-fit 3PL.
dashboard.matchBrandsDesc: Complete your 3PL profile to start receiving RFQs from brands that match your capabilities and regions.

brandSteps.search: Search by state, category, or platform
brandSteps.connect: Connect your store or add shipping signals
brandSteps.submit: Submit an RFQ with better context

scan.receiveDesc: Scan product UPC to receive inventory
scan.pickDesc: Scan location & product to confirm picks
scan.lookupDesc: Scan any barcode to view item info
scan.manualHint: The barcode scanner could not be loaded. You can type a barcode manually.
scan.cameraHint: Please allow camera access or use a device with a camera.
scan.noMatch: No match found for this barcode
